jobs.title: Data Scraping for B2B Sourcing
jobs.description: Description: I need data scraped from MercadoLibre and MercadoLivre across 4 countries. This is for B2B sourcing — I'm looking to identify high-volume sellers who are likely importers, not resellers. Target platforms: mercadolibre.com.co (Colombia) mercadolibre.cl (Chile) mercadolibre.com.ar (Argentina) mercadolivre.com.br (Brazil) Search terms per platform: Colombia/Chile/Argentina: "patineta eléctrica", "scooter eléctrico" Brazil: "patinete elétrica", "scooter elétrico" Data fields required per seller: Seller/store name Store URL (MercadoLibre profile page) Official website (if listed) Monthly sales volume estimate (visible on listing) Number of active listings "Tienda Oficial" status — yes or no Whether store name appears to be a brand/company name vs. personal name Country Scope: Top 200 sellers per country by sales volume, filtered to sellers with at least 10 units sold per month. Total up to 800 rows across 4 countries. Deliverable: One CSV file with all results, one tab/sheet per country. Delivered within 2 days. Budget: $40-60 Please share an example of similar work you've done before, and confirm you can deliver within 2 days.

jobs.title: Mid-Level Full Stack Developer (Python/FastAPI/AWS)
jobs.description: We are building a lightweight pathology/lab traceability platform for microscope slide manufacturing. Looking for a practical full-stack developer (not enterprise architect / not junior) to build a simple production-ready MVP. Tech stack: Python FastAPI PostgreSQL AWS (RDS, API Gateway, S3) React OR simple HTML frontend Scope includes: QR-based record lookup webpage REST APIs PostgreSQL integration PDF certificate generation QR generation script for manufacturing Simple authentication/user access This is intentionally a lean architecture using AWS managed services and simple frontend design. Ideal candidate: 3–7 years experience Has shipped internal tools or operational systems Comfortable working independently Avoids overengineering Strong communication Experience deploying production APIs on AWS Project duration: 4–8 weeks initially with possibility of longer-term engagement.

jobs.title: Python Developer — PDF Financial Data Extraction + LLM Pipeline (Supabase)
jobs.description: We are building a financial data pipeline that processes PDF reports from external sources, extracts transaction data using LLM, and maps it to an internal classification system for downstream display. This contract covers Phase 1a and 1b. Phase 1a deliverables: - PDF parsing engine supporting varied formats from multiple vendors - LLM-based extraction → structured JSON output - Configurable classification mapping layer (no hardcoding) - Configurable data enrichment and normalisation rules - Document intake & validation - Supabase schema design (RLS-ready for future phases) - Calculated fields via Supabase Edge Functions - Basic no-login dashboard for data validation Phase 1b deliverables: - Batch processing for multiple files - Historical data analysis and baseline generation - Anomaly flagging based on historical patterns - Foundation tables for future automation features You are a strong fit if you have: - Python as primary language (FastAPI or similar) - Hands-on experience processing PDFs from multiple different sources with varying formats - LLM API integration (OpenAI / Anthropic Claude / similar) - Experience mapping external categories to internal classification systems - PostgreSQL / Supabase experience - TypeScript for Supabase Edge Functions (or willingness to use Python backend as alternative) Nice to have: - Background in accounts payable automation, invoice processing, or financial document pipelines - Familiarity with pdfplumber, PyMuPDF, or similar PDF libraries Payment structure: - Fixed price, milestone-based - Milestone 1: Phase 1a complete and validated — 60% - Milestone 2: Phase 1b complete and validated — 40% Budget: USD 1,200 - 1,500 Timeline: 2–3 weeks Shortlisted candidates will be given a small paid technical assessment (USD 30–50) before contract award. The task reflects real project requirements and takes approximately 1 hour. Strong performers on Phase 1 will be first consideration for Phase 2 Screening question (required): Describe a project where you extracted structured data from PDFs with varying formats from different vendors and mapped it to an internal classification system. What tools and approach did you use?

jobs.title: Data scraping
jobs.description: I have a list of 500 law firms that needs an update in job titles and social media of the individuals

jobs.title: Develop an Agent that Finds Casting Calls
jobs.description: Build an agent that scrapes various websites / social media accounts / etc for a very specific casting call use case. Provides a visual list of the casting call every few days or once a week. Modify this to also search for a specific type of job. Ideally completed in one week. Include testing and ensuring the agent does not break.

jobs.title: Data Automation Expert Needed: Excel Power Query Tracker Rebuild (No VBA/Python)
jobs.description: Project Overview: I am looking for a data modeling specialist to rebuild a fragile, legacy Battalion tracking workbook. The current file relies on 40+ manual tabs and volatile formulas (OFFSET/INDIRECT) to track recruiter performance. I need this converted into an automated, refreshable dashboard using Excel Power Query. The Data Source: The query must process clean, standard .xlsx files from local folders: Folder 1 (Monthly Station Data): Contains 12 rolling monthly station reports (Metrics: Mission, Net Achieved, RA/USAR Volume). Folder 2 (Current Recruiter Data): Contains 1 current recruiter contribution report (Metrics: Recruiter Name, Combined Gross Volume). Static File (SDAP_Targets.xlsx): A lookup table mapping each Station ID (RSID) to its assigned recruiter capacity (SDAP Slots). The Math (90/10 Weighting): The final Power Query output must calculate a composite index score for each station: Mission Accomplishment (90% Weight): Mission Score = (Total RA Volume Net + Total USAR Volume Net) divided by (Total RA Volume Mission + Total USAR Volume Mission) Recruiter Contribution (10% Weight): Recruiter Score = Active Recruiter Contributors divided by Assigned SDAP Slots Final Index Score: The two metrics are fused together using the RSID as the linking key: Final Index Score = (Mission Score x 0.90) + (Recruiter Score x 0.10) Technical Requirements & Hardware Constraints: Deployment Environment: The solution will run on a locked-down DoD Windows PC. Methodology: You must exclusively use Power Query (M Code) and standard pivot tables/charts. STRICT RULE: NO VBA, NO MACROS, NO PYTHON. Proposals mentioning these will be immediately declined. The solution must refresh with a simple "Data tab, then Refresh All" click. Deliverables: A single, clean master Excel workbook containing the configured Power Query connections and the final sorted leaderboard. Clear instructions (or a short video) showing how to point the Power Query source parameters to my local folder paths so it runs seamlessly on my machine. To Apply: Please start your proposal with the word "BATTALION" to confirm you have read the requirements.

jobs.title: Senior Builder Wanted: Ship MVP Using Claude Code (Architecture-First Execution Role)
jobs.description:
You will take a complete system architecture and turn it into a working MVP using Claude Code as the primary implementation engine.

This is not a “write code from scratch” role.

This is a system execution role:
You translate architecture → structured prompts → generated code → working product.

Your success is measured by whether the system actually runs end-to-end.

Outcomes (Non-negotiable success criteria)
A fully working MVP is produced from an existing architecture document using Claude Code.
All core modules are implemented, connected, and runnable as a single system.
Frontend, backend, and services are integrated without broken boundaries or missing links.
The application runs locally (or deployed) with minimal manual debugging required.
The architecture is respected, not rewritten randomly or ignored.
Edge cases and unclear requirements are resolved with practical engineering judgment, not delays.
Output is production-structured code, not experimental fragments or disconnected snippets.

If it doesn’t run end-to-end, it’s not done.

Competencies (What separates strong from average here)
Deep ability to break system architecture into executable build steps.
High proficiency with AI coding workflows (Claude Code or equivalent tools).
Strong “systems thinking” — understands how services, modules, and data flow connect.
Ability to drive ambiguity to closure quickly without overthinking.
Bias toward shipping working software over perfect design debates.
Comfortable owning end-to-end implementation without needing hand-holding.
Fast iteration loop: prompt → generate → test → fix → integrate.
Knows when to follow architecture strictly vs when to make pragmatic execution decisions.
Important Reality of This Role

We are not hiring for:

“someone who writes code carefully line by line”
“someone who only follows tickets”
“someone who needs detailed step-by-step instructions”

We are hiring for:
a builder who can take a system design and force it into reality using AI tools.

You will be expected to think like a founder-engineer:
fast, opinionated, and execution-driven.

jobs.title: AI Assisted Data Entry Automation
jobs.description: I am looking for a developer to create an AI-assisted data entry and browser automation system for my existing work website. The system should efficiently manage data entry tasks and automate browser interactions to enhance productivity. The ideal candidate will have experience in integrating AI solutions with web applications and a strong understanding of data management processes.

jobs.title: Automated P2P Pricing Bot with Market Tracking, Price Range Limits, and Automatic Reset Logic
jobs.description: Hello, I am looking for a Python developer who can create or modify a Binance P2P bot. I want an automated system that monitors other merchants’ prices and automatically updates my ad price to stay above or below competitors according to the rules I choose. Required features: * Automatic monitoring of P2P ads * Automatic price updates * Ability to set minimum and maximum price limits * 24/7 operation * Secure connection through Binance API * Clean and easy-to-use code I also want the API permissions to be limited with withdrawals disabled. Please let me know: * your experience with Binance API, * if you have already built a similar bot, * the delivery time, * and your price.

jobs.title: Data entry - Manual Website Price Scraper
jobs.description: I need someone to scrape prices from a website. You'll need to fill a website form and register the results. The task involves web scraping and data entry, requiring attention to detail and accuracy. The ideal candidate should have experience in web scraping and data handling.
